name: Split Layout
description: Two-column layout with configurable ratio for main content and sidebar.

ratio.description: Column ratio between main and sidebar

decision_rule: Use for main content area + contextual sidebar. Default 2/3 + 1/3 for detail views, 3/4 + 1/4 for content-heavy pages.

filament_equivalent.note: In Filament forms, use Grid with columns() for multi-column layouts
